items.title: Anthropic's $1.5B piracy settlement with book authors is a record loss that hands AI labs their biggest legal win
items.title_ko: 앤트로픽, 15억 달러 저작권 합의로 AI 연구소에 법적 승리

이는 AI 연구소에 가장 큰 법적 승리를 안겨준다.

items.title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face

사이버 보안 전문가들이 지적했다.

items.title: Anthropic will deploy 2 gigawatts of AMD GPUs for Claude in a deal worth up to $5 billion

items.title: Bets against SpaceX grow to 32% of float as Elon Musk warns short sellers won't survive

items.title: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
